key_changes: Added findGitRoot(from:) helper - walks parent directories up to 6 levels looking for .auto-claude sentinel
Added resolveSpecDir(gitRoot:specId:) helper - prefix-matches spec directory under .auto-claude/specs/
Added loadAcPlan(cardURL:specId:) helper - loads implementation_plan.json from resolved spec directory
Modified BopCardPreview.acPlan from @State property to immutable property (state management change)
Modified preparePreviewOfFile to invoke loadAcPlan when meta.acSpecId is set and pass result to BopCardPreview

patterns_discovered.name: Progressive path resolution
patterns_discovered.description: Three-step hierarchical resolution: cardURL → gitRoot (.auto-claude) → specDir (prefix match) → planFile (JSON load)

patterns_discovered.name: Bounded directory traversal
patterns_discovered.description: Finite loop (6 iterations max) prevents infinite traversal and sets explicit scope boundary for .auto-claude discovery

patterns_discovered.name: Optional-chaining error handling
patterns_discovered.description: Guard statements with early returns allow graceful degradation when .auto-claude, specs dir, or plan file missing

patterns_discovered.name: Lazy loading with spec directory
patterns_discovered.description: Spec directory only resolved when meta.acSpecId is present, avoiding unnecessary filesystem work

patterns_discovered.name: Prefix-based directory matching
patterns_discovered.description: Spec directories matched by prefix + '-' separator (e.g., '014-slug'), sorted to handle versioning

gotchas_discovered.description: Changed acPlan from @State to immutable property; State mutations now impossible, but injection from parent is cleaner
gotchas_discovered.impact: BopCardPreview no longer owns plan loading lifecycle; entirely controlled by parent PreviewViewController

gotchas_discovered.description: Relies on .auto-claude directory presence to identify project root; breaks if directory missing or malformed
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cards outside Auto-Claude projects will silently fail to load plan; no fallback indicator

gotchas_discovered.description: Hard-coded walk depth of 6 levels may be insufficient for deeply nested card structures or multiple root levels
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cards >6 directories deep from .auto-claude will not find root; edge case but worth documenting

gotchas_discovered.issue: Spec directory sorted() but no version logic
gotchas_discovered.description: Spec directories sorted lexicographically; if multiple versions exist (e.g., '014-a', '014-b'), first alphabetically wins
gotchas_discovered.impact: Version selection is implicit and non-deterministic if multiple spec dirs match same prefix

approach_outcome.summary: Git root discovery and plan loading successfully integrated into Quick Look preview. Three helper functions cleanly separate concerns: directory walking, spec resolution, and plan deserialization. Integration into preparePreviewOfFile is minimal and non-invasive.
approach_outcome.validation: Subtask completed as specified; all three helpers implemented with proper optional unwrapping and error suppression

recommendations.suggestion: Cache findGitRoot result per card URL to avoid repeated filesystem traversals during preview lifecycle
Add debug logging for failed plan loads (missing .auto-claude, missing spec dir, JSON decode errors) to aid troubleshooting
Document the 6-level walk depth and .auto-claude sentinel requirements in code comments or project docs
Add fallback behavior or UI indicator when plan fails to load (e.g., gray-out plan tab or show 'Plan unavailable' message)
Add unit tests for findGitRoot with mock directory structures, edge cases (no .auto-claude, deeply nested paths)
Consider extracting spec resolution logic into a reusable service class if other preview components need plan data
